transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-13]
[00:00] You: Product launch planning. We're targeting a global launch for our new analytics module.
[00:45] Speaker 1: The dev complete date is August 7th. That's when all features need to be done and in staging.
[01:20] Speaker 2: QA testing runs August 10th through August 21st — two weeks.
[02:00] Speaker 3: We need the user documentation written by August 14th so it can be reviewed during QA. I'll have it done in two weeks — by July 27th for first draft, final by August 14th.
[02:50] You: What about the in-app onboarding tour?
[03:05] Speaker 1: The onboarding tour is part of the feature scope. It'll be done by August 7th with the rest of the dev work.
[03:35] Speaker 4: We should do a soft launch to a subset of customers first. I suggest a 1-week soft launch August 24th through August 30th before the full public launch.
[04:15] You: Good idea. So full public launch is August 31st?
[04:25] Speaker 4: Yes, August 31st. That gives us a week post-QA to fix any critical issues found in soft launch.
[04:55] Speaker 2: The press embargo lifts the morning of August 31st. I'll coordinate with PR — embargo confirmation goes to journalists by August 24th.
[05:30] Speaker 3: Customer success needs to be trained on the new module before launch. I'll schedule training for the week of August 17th.
[06:00] You: And the post-launch review — let's schedule that for three weeks after launch, so around September 21st.
